qa_pairs.question: Which artists with the famous title Unholy Metal Way (re-release) have a song called Looking for a New Love that was on volume issue 46:10 and stayed at the top for at most 1.0 weeks?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN volume ON artist.artist_id = volume.artist_id
WHERE volume.volume_issue = '46:10' AND volume.weeks_on_top <= 1.0 AND artist.famous_title = 'Unholy Metal Way (re-release)' AND volume.song = 'Looking for a New Love'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which artist entities with famous title equal to 'Unholy Metal Way (re-release)', having at least one related volume record (linked on artist.artist_id = volume.artist_id) with volume issue equal to '46:10' and weeks on top at most '1.0' and song equal to 'Looking for a New Love'?

qa_pairs.question: Who is the artist named Ophiolatry with the famous title Transmutation that had a volume issue 45:15 released on 17 January and stayed at least 1 week on top?

WHERE volume.issue_date = '17 January' AND volume.volume_issue = '45:15' AND volume.weeks_on_top >= 1.0 AND artist.artist = 'Ophiolatry' AND artist.famous_title = 'Transmutation'

SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist

WHERE artist.famous_title = 'Bergen 1996' AND artist.age <= 34 AND artist.artist = 'Gorgoroth' AND volume.weeks_on_top >= 3.0
